title: descurainia incisa subsp. viscosa
intro: Descurainia incisa subsp. viscosa, also known as sticky false rocket or sticky rockcress, is a perennial herb in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to western North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Descurainia incisa subsp. viscosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
